---
title: "Data Analysis Projects"
author:  "Vinh Hung Le"
output:
  html_document:
    fig_width: 1
---

----

- [Data Visualization Collecion Created in ggplot2](https://vinhhle.github.io/data_viz/)
- [Principle Component Analysis: Discovering patterns in a wine dataset](https://vinhhle.github.io/PCA/)

----
